top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(height_cm) 
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN race r ON s.race_id = r.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics' 
  AND r.race != 'Human';

SELECT AVG(height_cm) 
FROM superhero 
WHERE publisher_id = (SELECT id FROM publisher WHERE publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics') 
AND race_id != (SELECT id FROM race WHERE race = 'Human');

final.sql:
SELECT AVG(height_cm) 
FROM superhero s
JOIN publisher p ON s.publisher_id = p.id
JOIN race r ON s.race_id = r.id
WHERE p.publisher_name = 'Dark Horse Comics' 
  AND r.race != 'Human';
